community_pulse: The community is experiencing simultaneous wins (dental health, mental clarity, inflammation reduction) and specific pain points (histamine sensitivity, early-stage weight gain confusion, skin issues during adaptation). Food policy debates are bleeding into dietary discussions as RFK/glyphosate conversations gain traction.
